issues.counterparty_change_summary: Counterparty removed the $150,000 aggregate liability cap from Section 8.
issues.external_rationale_for_footnote: Section 8 must retain the standard aggregate liability cap.
issues.proposed_replacement_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.

verdict_summary: One issue identified in Section 8 requiring attention before your organization can accept this draft.
